title: bus.rs: LocalBus BusMessage::Direct is defined but never consumed by any relay handler
description: bus.rs defines BusMessage::Direct for point-to-point cross-instance delivery. The bus publish path in state.rs only sends BusMessage::Broadcast. No code subscribes to the bus and routes Direct messages. The Direct variant is dead code in the current single-instance deployment and there is no subscriber task. A contributor who adds Redis bus support will publish Direct messages that are never delivered, with no compile-time error.
